summary: Agent duplicate search and document creation must expose safe, team-scoped shortcuts instead of forcing agents into raw local SQL or failing GraphQL retries.
reason: Agents were still losing time on team disambiguation and Linear Docs creation: `similar` could only search all teams, while `documents create` allowed parentless requests that Linear rejected and required UUID-only team parents.
validated_outcome: Focused regression tests cover team-scoped FTS ranking, `similar --team`, document-create parent preflight, team-key resolution before `documentCreate`, and typed API exit codes for Linear `success=false` mutation responses.
